expectations.text: Uses confluence.mjs search (not jira.mjs) as primary search
expectations.evidence: Does not use confluence.mjs. Describes REST API calls (GET /wiki/rest/api/content/search) but not the skill's script.

expectations.text: CQL includes terms like deployment, runbook, or deploy
expectations.evidence: Shows CQL 'title~"deployment runbook"' and search query 'deployment+runbook' which includes both terms.

expectations.text: Plans to fetch full page content with confluence.mjs get-page
expectations.evidence: Describes fetching page content via REST API 'GET /wiki/rest/api/content/{pageId}?expand=body.storage' but not using confluence.mjs get-page.

expectations.text: Presents results with page title and source citation
expectations.evidence: Cannot present results since no search was executed. Only describes the API approach.
